mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ht_bill_user WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ht_bill_user (login_id, login_pw, name, department, phone, extension_no, email, use_yn, role, default_provider_id) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{loginPw}, #{name}, #{department}, #{phone}, #{extensionNo}, #{email}, IFNULL(#{useYn}, 'Y'), IFNULL(#{role}, 'USER'), #{defaultProviderId})
mapper.update: UPDATE ht_bill_user SET department = #{department}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, default_provider_id = #{defaultProviderId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, schedule_date, title, memo, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM ht_bill_schedule WHERE schedule_date = #{scheduleDate} ORDER BY id
SELECT id, schedule_date, title, memo, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM ht_bill_schedule WHERE schedule_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY schedule_date, id
SELECT id, schedule_date, title, memo, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM ht_bill_schedule WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ht_bill_schedule (schedule_date, title, memo, created_by) VALUES (#{scheduleDate}, #{title}, #{memo}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE ht_bill_schedule SET title = #{title}, memo = #{memo}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, corp_num, biz_type, biz_classification, corp_name, ceo_name, contact_name, contact_phone, email, address, last_document_no, use_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM ht_bill_provider WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ht_bill_provider (corp_num, biz_type, biz_classification, corp_name, ceo_name, contact_name, contact_phone, email, address, use_yn) VALUES (#{corpNum}, #{bizType}, #{bizClassification}, #{corpName}, #{ceoName}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{email}, #{address}, IFNULL(#{useYn}, 'Y'))
mapper.select: SELECT id, provider_id, recipient_type, corp_num, tax_num, biz_type, biz_classification, corp_name, ceo_name, id_num, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, email, address, use_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM ht_bill_recipient ORDER BY use_yn DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, provider_id, recipient_type, corp_num, tax_num, biz_type, biz_classification, corp_name, ceo_name, id_num, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, email, address, use_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM ht_bill_recipient WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND IFNULL(corp_name, '') = IFNULL(#{corpName}, '') AND IFNULL(address, '') = IFNULL(#{address}, '') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, provider_id, recipient_type, corp_num, tax_num, biz_type, biz_classification, corp_name, ceo_name, id_num, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, email, address, use_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM ht_bill_recipient WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND recipient_type = #{recipientType}
AND IFNULL(corp_num, '') = IFNULL(#{corpNum}, '')
AND IFNULL(id_num, '') = IFNULL(#{idNum}, '')
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.provider_id, r.recipient_type, r.corp_num, r.tax_num, r.biz_type, r.biz_classification, r.corp_name, r.ceo_name, r.id_num, r.contact_name, r.contact_phone, r.contact_email, r.email, r.address, r.use_yn, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM ht_bill_power_plant_recipient_contract c JOIN ht_bill_recipient r ON r.id = c.recipient_id WHERE c.power_plant_id = #{powerPlantId} AND c.use_yn = 'Y' AND r.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ht_bill_recipient (provider_id, recipient_type, corp_num, tax_num, biz_type, biz_classification, corp_name, ceo_name, id_num, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, email, address, use_yn) VALUES (#{providerId}, #{recipientType}, #{corpNum}, #{taxNum}, #{bizType}, #{bizClassification}, #{corpName}, #{ceoName}, #{idNum}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{email}, #{address}, IFNULL(#{useYn}, 'Y'))
mapper.update: UPDATE ht_bill_recipient SET provider_id=#{providerId}, recipient_type=#{recipientType}, corp_num=#{corpNum}, tax_num=#{taxNum}, biz_type=#{bizType}, biz_classification=#{bizClassification}, corp_name=#{corpName}, ceo_name=#{ceoName}, id_num=#{idNum}, contact_name=#{contactName}, contact_phone=#{contactPhone}, contact_email=#{contactEmail}, email=#{email}, address=#{address}, use_yn=#{useYn}, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, member_type, party_type, biz_owner_type, corp_name, ceo_name, corp_num, biz_type, biz_classification, id_num, mobile_phone, address, email, payment_method, biz_license_file, contract_info, contract_detail, monitoring, memo, use_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM ht_bill_power_plant ORDER BY CASE WHEN use_yn = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, id DESC

SELECT id, member_type, party_type, biz_owner_type, corp_name, ceo_name, corp_num, biz_type, biz_classification, id_num, mobile_phone, address, email, payment_method, biz_license_file, contract_info, contract_detail, monitoring, memo, use_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM ht_bill_power_plant WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, member_type, party_type, biz_owner_type, corp_name, ceo_name, corp_num, biz_type, biz_classification, id_num, mobile_phone, address, email, payment_method, biz_license_file, contract_info, contract_detail, monitoring, memo, use_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM ht_bill_power_plant WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND IFNULL(corp_name, '') = IFNULL(#{corpName}, '') AND IFNULL(address, '') = IFNULL(#{address}, '') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ht_bill_power_plant ( member_type, party_type, biz_owner_type, corp_name, ceo_name, corp_num, biz_type, biz_classification, id_num, mobile_phone, address, email, payment_method, biz_license_file, contract_info, contract_detail, monitoring, memo, use_yn ) VALUES ( #{memberType}, #{partyType}, #{bizOwnerType}, #{corpName}, #{ceoName}, #{corpNum}, #{bizType}, #{bizClassification}, #{idNum}, #{mobilePhone}, #{address}, #{email}, #{paymentMethod}, #{bizLicenseFile}, #{contractInfo}, #{contractDetail}, #{monitoring}, #{memo}, IFNULL(#{useYn}, 'Y') )
mapper.update: UPDATE ht_bill_power_plant SET member_type = #{memberType}, party_type = #{partyType}, biz_owner_type = #{bizOwnerType}, corp_name = #{corpName}, ceo_name = #{ceoName}, corp_num = #{corpNum}, biz_type = #{bizType}, biz_classification = #{bizClassification}, id_num = #{idNum}, mobile_phone = #{mobilePhone}, address = #{address}, email = #{email}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, biz_license_file = #{bizLicenseFile}, contract_info = #{contractInfo}, contract_detail = #{contractDetail}, monitoring = #{monitoring}, memo = #{memo}, use_yn = IFNULL(#{useYn}, 'Y'), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ht_bill_power_plant_recipient_contract ( power_plant_id, recipient_id, contract_year, item_no, supply_total, tax_total, grand_total, item_name, use_yn, memo ) VALUES ( #{powerPlantId}, #{recipientId}, #{contractYear}, IFNULL(#{itemNo}, 1), IFNULL(#{supplyTotal}, 0), IFNULL(#{taxTotal}, 0), IFNULL(#{grandTotal}, 0), #{itemName}, IFNULL(#{useYn}, 'Y'), #{memo} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE supply_total = VALUES(supply_total), tax_total = VALUES(tax_total), grand_total = VALUES(grand_total), item_name = VALUES(item_name), use_yn = VALUES(use_yn), memo = VALUES(memo), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS contract_id, c.power_plant_id, p.corp_name AS power_plant_name, c.recipient_id, c.contract_year, c.item_no, c.supply_total, c.tax_total, c.grand_total, c.use_yn, c.item_name, c.memo, r.recipient_type, r.corp_name, r.corp_num, r.tax_num, r.biz_type, r.biz_classification, r.ceo_name, r.id_num, r.contact_name, r.contact_phone, r.contact_email, r.address, r.email FROM ht_bill_power_plant_recipient_contract c JOIN ht_bill_power_plant p ON p.id = c.power_plant_id JOIN ht_bill_recipient r ON r.id = c.recipient_id WHERE c.power_plant_id = #{powerPlantId} AND c.contract_year = #{contractYear} AND c.use_yn = 'Y' AND r.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY r.id DESC, c.item_no ASC

SELECT c.id AS contract_id, c.power_plant_id, p.corp_name AS power_plant_name, c.recipient_id, c.contract_year, c.item_no, c.supply_total, c.tax_total, c.grand_total, c.use_yn, c.item_name, c.memo, r.recipient_type, r.corp_name, r.corp_num, r.tax_num, r.biz_type, r.biz_classification, r.ceo_name, r.id_num, r.contact_name, r.contact_phone, r.contact_email, r.address, r.email FROM ht_bill_power_plant_recipient_contract c JOIN ht_bill_power_plant p ON p.id = c.power_plant_id JOIN ht_bill_recipient r ON r.id = c.recipient_id WHERE c.contract_year = #{contractYear} AND c.use_yn = 'Y' AND p.use_yn = 'Y' AND r.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY c.power_plant_id DESC, r.id DESC, c.item_no ASC
SELECT id, power_plant_id, provider_id, recipient_id, subject, document_no, issue_date, grand_total, send_yn, status, error_msg, created_at FROM ht_bill_invoice_log ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, power_plant_id, provider_id, recipient_id, subject, document_no, issue_date, grand_total, send_yn, status, error_msg, created_at FROM ht_bill_invoice_log WHERE power_plant_id = #{powerPlantId} AND issue_date >= CONCAT(#{contractYear}, '0101') AND issue_date <= CONCAT(#{contractYear}, '1231') ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, power_plant_id, provider_id, recipient_id, subject, document_no, issue_date, grand_total, send_yn, status, error_msg, created_at FROM ht_bill_invoice_log WHERE issue_date >= CONCAT(#{contractYear}, '0101') AND issue_date <= CONCAT(#{contractYear}, '1231') ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM ht_bill_invoice_log WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT approval_no FROM ht_bill_invoice_log WHERE power_plant_id = #{powerPlantId} AND recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND issue_date >= CONCAT(#{contractYear}, '0101') AND issue_date <= CONCAT(#{contractYear}, '1231') AND approval_no IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(approval_no) != '' ORDER BY IFNULL(sent_at, created_at) DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ht_bill_invoice_log WHERE issue_date >= #{startDate} AND issue_date <= #{endDate}
